error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.remoteBody: This section is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
error.appBody: An unexpected error occurred. Return to the home page to continue.
auth.signInDescription: Use the email and password for your Atlas account. Your session is stored securely in the browser.
auth.passwordHint: At least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.signUpDescription: Plan smarter trips with AI. Step 1 of 2 — account details.
auth.countryHint: 2-letter ISO code, e.g. US, BR, ES.
auth.signUpAgreement: By creating an account you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
auth.accessDeniedDescription: You must be signed in to open {{name}}. This area is only available with an active Atlas session.
auth.sessionErrorDescription: We could not verify your account. Try signing in again, or return to the home page.
purchase.title: You need more credits
purchase.body: Credits power AI trip planning. No subscription — pay only for what you use.
notFound.title: This page doesn't exist
notFound.body: {{path}} couldn't be found. It may have moved or the link might be broken.
mobileNav.label: Mobile navigation
